pi_items.source: Web search for 27.7172N 85.3240E exactly matches coordinates in Kathmandu, Nepal, near Durbar Marg.
Web search for 27.7172N 85.3240E exactly matches coordinates in Kathmandu, Nepal.
Web search confirms Kathmandu is located at an altitude of approximately 1400 meters, matching the task prompt requirements.
Web search confirms VNKT is the official ICAO code for Tribhuvan International Airport in Kathmandu, Nepal.
Web search cross-referenced the NORAD IDs with the requested satellite names (SUOMI NPP = 37849, NOAA 19 = 33591, METOP-B = 38771, METOP-C = 43689). Additionally, inspected local TLE data files.

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the geographic coordinates (27.7172 N, 85.3240 E) correspond precisely to Kathmandu, Nepal, with an approximate altitude of 1400 meters. The requested weather station code VNKT correctly matches Tribhuvan International Airport in Kathmandu. I also cross-referenced the NORAD IDs for the required Earth Observation satellites and confirmed they are correct: SUOMI NPP is 37849, NOAA 19 is 33591, METOP-B is 38771, and METOP-C is 43689.
